desc_en: A simple makeshift armor for the upper body.
Simple leather hat, doesn't look that great but does its job.
This blazing blue party hat can be worn to celebrate a special anniversary.
The hallmark of every professional cook. Proof that even in the undergrounds taste can have priority over nutrition.
It's just a spotless, white jacket but the red neckerchief makes it official. Time to get cookin'!
Sporting an apron, these pants are made to prove their worth in the steam and heat of a cave kitchen.
Itchy feathers and a concerning lack of ventilation make this chicken body piece a bold choice of clothing.
A derpy-looking chicken hat that will be center of attention at the next party. Clucking funny!
These flashy pants are chicken skin-inducing and complete the look of an egg-citing easter costume.
An intimidating but well-meaning mask that invokes the spirit of mythological dragons.
A spacious, oval shape that is made from hopes, dreams and lime. In other words: Egg.
Everyone wearing this oversized egg shell hat has only one mission: to become egg.
These cheaply made pants are as yellow as egg yolk and itchy beyond comprehension.
A hat that's made to go adventuring. Never falls off, even when a giant boulder is chasing behind.
A leather jacket that's almost too warm to wear on adventures, but it looks cool!
A good pair of pants that is made for traveling long distances and sneaking past ancient traps.
A beautiful crown made from leaves and pink roses. It resembles a love that feels like eternal spring.
This groovy green party hat can be worn to celebrate a special anniversary.
This perky purple party hat can be worn to celebrate a special anniversary.
This radical red party hat can be worn to celebrate a special anniversary.
The elegant jacket has a stuck-on rose and is perfect for a romantic dinner. Remember to show up on time.
These pants are made from black, silky fabric and hint at sophistication and confidence.
This hat is worn by everyone who considers themself an admirable adventurer equipped with a captivating charisma.
A simple, white dress elevating the beauty of its wearer. There are many occasions to wear it but the most important one is being a bride.
Very crude armor for the upper body. Offers minor protection.
Slight protection for the head but you should look for better options soon.
The next best thing when it comes to lower body armor.
Looks familiar.
A humble wizard's hat.
Comfortable and breezy pants that aid in focus.
A plain robe worn by mages in training.
A rag fit for a suspenseful ruffian.
Got no sixpack? Just craft one!
Resembles more of a bucket but repels strong blows to the head.
Protects the shins with ease.
A warm, soft hat to keep ones ears warm in the cold season. You can't get around wearing one of those in winter.
Sticky things slide right off from this glossy elastic coat. The bright yellow is just a nice touch.
A dark hood of old cloth. Hardly anything but eyes set on your target peep through.
These sturdy leather pants tighten your stance and grant you steady aim for your target.
A light tunic with a quiver allowing for swift archery.
Smooth slime-proof boots that keep your feet dry and agile. Also great for jumping into puddles.
A warm neckcloth for colder seasons.
It grows on your head. You can feel your wounds growing shut along with it.
Whatever one is feeling at the moment, this hat covers it all up with a happy expression made from coal and carrots.
A once-ordinary hat now stuffed with scribbled notes, maps, and theories about the underground. Listen closely, and it might just share a helpful hint or two.
A rustic top hat with various trinkets along the brim.
A pair of jeans with a golden chain strapped on.
A worn vest with a simple shirt underneath.
Squeaky footwear made from a rubber-like material. It's uncomfortably wet.
A good armor to survive battles more easily.
This helm repels slight blows to the head.
Some bronze for the shin.
This grand headdress shows clearly who's boss.
Fine shorts with plenty of jewelry, well suited for a leader.
Made with some of the finest Bambuck wool.
When wearing this tunic, one feels as if they have been sent from the heavens to spread love.
A glimmering party hat for a generous heart. The caves feel a little less dark, and the world a little less gloomy thanks to your charity.
A heavy clay cover that has partially cracked and doubles down as a funny hat.
This brittle clay container is just your size and usually filled with caveling supplies.
A shiny metal cover that suppresses your boiling point.
Only the ones really passionate about cooking dare to become the pot itself.
A black satin cape fit for a vampire. The crimson flip-up collar adds to the evil look.
A headpiece worn by caveling skirmishers which has been cobbled together with larvaskin, leaves and dirty cloth.
A heavy capsule that would be airtight if not for the narrow slits of its faceplate.
A pair of sturdy sabatons impervious to being windswept from shockwaves.
A rusty amalgam of plates fit to endure the fiercest demolitions.
Made from grub leather, good for unhindered movement in combat.
Light armor hood that hides the face.
These pants don't cover much but make your movement more elusive.
Charge into battle with this epic chest piece.
Tough helm fit for knights. Comes with a visor and a flamboyant plume.
You've got knees of steel!
Monocular night vision made from various scientific gadgetry.
A specialized lab coat faintly tinged with radiation. It's probably harmless.
A pair of pale leggings designed to idle on office chairs, yet perfectly fit for outrunning extradimensional horrors.
A stylish hat and scarf, fit for one another.
Comes equipped with winged boots that should aid your mobility.
Comfy and lightweight, this poncho flows well as you run.
Boohooo, behold the dirty bedding!
A cheap last-minute attempt to get ready for the spooky season.
A cumbersome but sturdy armor piece of finely chiselled stone.
Bulky legwear sculpted from solid rock. The best way to train the calves.
A coat with deep pockets fit for a hoggish, dodgy fancier.
An organic body armor resembling Ghorm's shell, it is heavy and feels weird on the inside.
A chitin-plated head piece, wearing it fills you with the urge to dig paths through the darkness.
Put more head on your head. Doesn't necessarily add up to more brain, though.
This gingerbread headpiece has not been baked, so it remains flexible to be drawn over the head.
Fairly stiff legs are the main feature of this baked armor, as well as crumbs between the toes.
A tasty breast armor made from gingerbread, comes with sugar buttons and a fondant bowtie.
A funny headpiece made from gingerbread. Just ignore the creepy smile and soulless eyes.
Don't be anything else. Be grub.
No need for fancy hats. Just grub.
A fruit head with a carved-in face. For how disgusting it feels from the inside, it looks pretty cool on the outside.
Tuck a straw in your mouth and get ready for a whole day of relaxing on the porch.
A fleshy suit covered by protective spines. The feeling on your skin is quite unpleasant.
A helm crowned with erratic fangs and thorns akin to those on the Hive Mother maw.
Legwear of haphazard pillows of thick hide that wrap around the legs as defensive folds.
A rare headpiece that crowns you as king of all slimes. You feel very royal wearing it.
A skull covered in ritualistic markings. Its burning eye sockets ignite a fiery fury in you.
A blue underwear piece that goes well with its top part. Get rid of unnecessary clothing and run free in the sun!
A blue swim suit piece that keeps everything in its place. Everyone knows the most revealing armor is the most protective.
Wearing those chill blue shorts tempts you to constantly form the shaka sign with your hand.
A wooden mask with decorative beads and a distant stare.
A pair of shorts, decorated with various bands and jewelry.
A simple tunic but with jewelry and fine fabrics layered on top.
A green underwear piece that goes well with its top part. Get rid of unnecessary clothing and run free in the sun!
A green swim suit piece that keeps everything in its place. Everyone knows the most revealing armor is the most protective.
Wearing those chill green shorts tempts you to constantly form the shaka sign with your hand.
A cloak crafted from big leaves woven together. Makes you look like a walking bush.
This hood is made from big leaves tucked into a headband. Lets you blend into green environments.
An upper body armor made from long kelp strands. Now you feel like a real creature of the sea.
This lily pad appears unusually sturdy. It fits on your head nicely.
A light pair of shorts with a lily pad strapped around the hip.
A light shirt with a lily pad strapped over. A little flower is keeping it tied in place.
The only thing you need to put on when you want to rush through the jungle as a one-man-army…wait, that was something else.
Camouflaged leggings that keep you on your toes around heavily-guarded areas.
Green and full of sweat this piece of clothing is perfect for emerging from the shadows guns blazing.
A chest-piece covered in living mold, hungering for big prey.
A head-piece covered in living mold. Its pulse enhances your bodily functions.
Legwear covered in living mold. It seems uninterested in feeding on the wearer.
A cute hood featuring white rabbit ears. You feel quite cheeky and swift wearing it.
A cute headband featuring white rabbit ears. You feel quite cheeky and swift wearing it.
A red underwear piece that goes well with its top part. Get rid of unnecessary clothing and run free in the sun!
A red swim suit piece that keeps everything in its place. Everyone knows the most revealing armor is the most protective.
Wearing those chill red shorts tempts you to constantly form the shaka sign with your hand.
Fierce upper body armor for true warriors.
Menacing-looking horned helm, fits perfectly with the rest of the set.
March through your enemies and don't look back.
Nothing is more important than sporting cool sunglasses, even when it's dark.
A towel is about the most massively useful thing an underground miner can have.
A wooden mask with decorative leaves and horns attuned to the wildlife.
Leafy legwear made from ancient wooden roots that seem to connect with the earth whenever one stands still.
This wooden chest-piece is wrapped in a bundle of mysteriously unwithering leaves.
Lower body armor naturally grown in the underground jungle, featuring thorned kneecaps.
This organic breastplate armor is crested with thorns, allowing for stronger critical hits.
A jade headband with hypnotically swaying fringes.
Baggy shalvar pants under a jade sarong-like cloth that almost floats as you move.
A pair of near weightless jade sashes connected by a gilded ring, flowing in light breeze.
This mysterious breastplate stimulates the muscles to swing your weapon much faster.
A strange headgear with no visor. For some reason you can still see clearly when putting it on.
This peculiar leg protection phases energy through your whole body.
An eerie beaked mask. Its inside reeks of rancid death, yet lets you live to smell it.
A gelatinous upper body armor that looks like someone dumped a bucket of goo onto you.
A gooey, constantly dripping helm that covers half of your face.
This heavy chunk of metal was used to explore deep waters, unfortunately it's leaking now. Still works as a nice armor piece.
A upper body armor reminiscent of the Sea Titan. There is a sleek cape attached to it.
An iron-cast helm with a scary grimace and potruding tentacles.
Delicately decorated leg protection that's constantly wet. Looks cool but is very uncomfortable to wear.
A golden breastplate with loose fabric sewn to it that makes you feel like a stealthy warrior of the desert.
A mysterious piece of equipment with a golden mask. It seems to have been granted to warriors of high rank.
Wide harem pants made for fighting, coupled with a set of pointy golden shoes.
A magically-imbued piece of cloth, worn by caveling scholars. Wearing it you feel in tune with the ancients.
A strange hood made from white linen and gold, in its shade you feel more intelligent than usual.
A hood worn by Initiated mages.
Sturdy pants with plenty of pockets for magical trinkets.
A robust robe, using magic fused into the fabric to withstand attacks.
This multi-layered piece of fabric is tightly woven to keep the body cool and protect from coarse, grainy sand.
A mysterious hood for true desert dwellers that keeps the face in shade.
A futuristic helmet fit for a space explorer. Looking through its visor is like looking into the depths of the universe.
A futuristic armor for the lower body. It makes you feel like every small step you take is a giant leap for mankind.
A futuristic protection for the upper body. Its intimidating yet elegant design is a true marvel to look at.
A blue soft nightcap.
A pair of blue comfortable nightpants.
A blue cozy nightshirt.
The detached head of a core sentry. Wearing it feels incredibly clunky and heavy but it makes up for it with great protection.
A pair of earrings, each with an elegant tassel decoration.
A fine skirt with multiple decorative tassels.
A top featuring tassels along the bottom.
An airtight zip-up suit for working in deep caverns. The flashy orange makes it official.
Well-fitting pants that make traversing the underground much more convenient. Comes with squeaky rubber boots.
A masterfully crafted upper body armor to endure the dangers of the desert.
A lower body armor mimicking the properties of desert critters.
A helm made in the design of Ra-Akar, casting its central eye on your enemies.
Heavy pants that are less suited for quick movements and more for safely treading on foreign planets.
This airtight jacket keeps the atmosphere around your body evenly pressured and is equipped with a system to increase damage efficiency.
A futuristic helm sealed under a big glass dome, leaving the view open to marvel at the miracles of space.
This noble robe covers the body in a cascading, silk-like fabric. The woven in ancient gemstone enhance spiritual capabilities.
A set of pants that feels very comfortable to wear. Rooting you in the here and now, you can feel your mental focus increasing.
A unique, royal piece of armor resembling the heart of the state. Golden wings were added to inherit the grace of Azeos. Before it could be used, the kingdom crumbled to dust from the inside.

conditions.label: Additional Chance On Crit To Spawn Thunder Beam

desc_en: A unique, royal piece of armor resembling the head of the state, crowning it as a descendant of the gods. It was intended for a future that never came.

conditions.label: Additional Chance On Hit To Spawn Scarab Boss Projectile

desc_en: A unique, royal piece of armor resembling the heir of the state, which was supposed to carry the glory of the kingdom when inheriting the throne. A dark prophecy and act of assassination ended the royal line.

conditions.label: Additional Chance On Range Hit To Spawn Octopus Boss Projectile

desc_en: A grand, ominous robe with sharp shoulder pads.
This opposing hood is sure to strike fear into your opponents.
Despite the sturdy, skeletal frame, you can still move with ease.
Need to handle strange materials that emit even stranger radiation? Ask no more!
Whatever the problem is, encountering it behind a protective suit makes it a little less stressful.
A protective suit is not complete without some boots that save the feet.
A pretty awesome piece of equipment that makes you look like the harbinger of doom.
A melting leg armor made from liquid stone, giving hot legs a whole new definition.
This fiery armor is almost too hot to handle but becomes well-tempered when worn.
A handy helm with integrated goggles and a still functioning headlamp.
A nearly indestructible helm forged with patience and precision. When it is worn, you feel energized, lively and protected.
A crystalline piece of equipment that shields the upper body like a fortress. The bright material evokes old memories of the sun.
Heavy hip protection made from miraculous materials. When it is worn, you feel guided along a path to victory.
The magic energies around you let you see just as clearly as with your eyes.
A cloak with particular magical patterns woven in.
Both sturdy and light, these pants won't get in the way while casting spells.
A fierce looking helm that resembles the head of the Atlantean Worm. How it came to be is a mystery.
An astonishing upper body armor that sends pulses of energy through the body. It feels almost forbidden to wear it, brimming with more power than a human body could potentially handle.
Woven from otherworldly cloth in confusing patterns, this armor piece escapes any understanding of earthly craftsmanship.
The discarded headpiece of a high-rank armor. When worn, you can feel an immense power surging through your mind. It's whispering words you could never understand.
The nearly indestructible rib bones of a hydra; they adjust to the chest size of the wearer.
The gruesome-looking empty skull of a hydra. One senses a malevolent presence when putting it on.
An extremely sturdy lower body armor reinforced with hydra bone plates.
An apron contaminated with at least five never-before-seen chemical compounds.
Goggles saturated with a maniacal green from one too many experimental mishaps.
Pants reeking of the strange smells from the countless vials lining its belt.
Hidden by the dark.
Moving swiftly as the wind.
Gone without a sound.
These plates feel inexplicably connected to your entire nervous system. When worn, your muscles twitch with anticipation.
Glistening and twisted. When worn, you feel attuned to all possible outcomes.
Light and breathable leg armor. When worn, you can sense the smallest tremors beneath your feet.
A mysterious headpiece that resembles some sort of animal.
Some light fabric over a dark, full-body layer. It's rather tight.
A light tunic over a dark, full-body layer underneath. Fitted with golden jewelry.
The gel padding adds a bounce to your step. Surprisingly quiet for the force contained within.
This volatile mass latches its plating onto your body. It feels ready to retaliate.
Like a crown, when worn, you assert yourself dominant over the forces within this sulfuric mass.
A heavy contraption of a chestpiece consisting of rusty layers welded to a glasslike dark material.
A helmet brimming with dark pressure. You feel it could burst from the slightest crack.
A pair of rusty sheets coiled around sleek dark purplish leggings.
A chestpiece that makes your heart feel hollow.
A headgear that makes your mind feel void of emotion.
A pair of leggings that makes your lower body feel weightless.
A heat-resistant metal chestpiece filled with of thermoreductive slag wool.
A heat-resistant metal headpiece that protects the wearer from hazardous particles.
Heat-resistant metal leggings that consist of insulating multilayered fiberglass.
